sources.provider: BfV press page (Federal Office for the Protection of the Constitution)
sources.comment: Press page of Germany’s Federal Office for the Protection of the Constitution (BfV) providing contact information and press releases in English.
Official DSN Austria homepage (German); no English-language DSN site or feed is available.

sources.provider: Institute for Strategic Dialogue (ISD) a Articles & Reports
sources.comment: No stable RSS endpoint across sections; using the homepage and relying on keyword filtering.
Dutch National Coordinator for Security and Counterterrorism English terrorism threat assessment page.
Latest news page of the Netherlands' National Coordinator for Security and Counterterrorism (NCTV), in English, listing news and press releases.
English site of the Belgian Coordination Unit for Threat Analysis (CUTA) providing information on the general threat level in Belgium; replacement for the OCAM/OCAD English page.
Danish Police Intelligence Service English news for terrorism threat assessment and prevention context.
Norwegian Police Security Service (PST) English page for reporting suspicious activity; describes PST’s role and threat landscape; accessible alternative to the unavailable English news page.
EU Commission-funded RAN network publications on radicalisation prevention and counter-extremism approaches.
Press-room news page of the Swedish Security Service (Säkerhetspolisen) in English, listing recent news and updates about security threats.

sources.provider: SUPO Finland news and press releases
sources.comment: News and press releases page of Finland's Security and Intelligence Service (SUPO) in English, offering recent press releases and statements.
